violations.text: Menu is lacking an allergen statement. Per interview with owner/operator, new menu with allergen statement will be printed today. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Per interview of owner/operator, an employee will be registered in an approved food safety management course. Owner/operator or employee certified in food safety management will register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025

The cutting boards of the prep units and some of the individual cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Per interview of owner/operator, new cutting boards will be ordered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets of the prep units and the cold drawers were observed in poor repair, splitting away from the doors/drawers. New gaskets are to be ordered. In addition, cold drawers and walk-in cooler observed in poor repair. These units are not currently being used. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025
Menu is lacking an allergy statement. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Employee(s) must register in and successfully complete an approved course in food safety management. One employee certified in food safety must register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as Certified Food Safety Manager. Approved courses and application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

Ambient temperature of cold drawers observed at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Foods observed with temperatures of 47 - 48 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Voluntary disposal during inspection. Cold drawer unit is not to be used to store TCS foods until it is serviced and maintaining a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025
Spray bottle used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies was not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by a live mouse observed in the warewashing area and droppings observed around the perimeter of the basement. No food/food equipment observed to be contaminated. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment has active pest control. Pest control is to be contacted to assess this issue. Areas of droppings are to be cleaned and sanitized in order to observe activity level. Pest control to be increased as needed. Pest control report must be available for inspector to review upon re-inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

The cutting boards of the prep units as well as the individual cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025

Refrigeration gaskets of a couple of the prep units as well as the cold drawer unit were observed in poor repair, split away from the door/drawer. Gaskets are to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the kitchen and bar dishwashers. Test strips must be obtained. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler condenser and condenser fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The duct work above the cook/grill line and the fan in the dishwasher room observed with an accumulation of dust and dirt. These areas must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black/brown residues. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine is being properly cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023

The cutting boards of the prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the duct above the grill line and the ventilation fans of the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023
A section of the floor in the warewashing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
